current_phase: stabilization, integration hardening, and workflow expansion
summary: BrandBuild is live on brandbuild.online with the premium dashboard, compare workspace, assets workspace, repaired campaign creation flow, authenticated storage-backed asset routing, a working in-app Sora media proxy, and a verified signed-in operator flow. On 2026-03-26 the live dashboard successfully completed login, campaign creation, hosted reference attachment, and live Sora queueing against the correct Supabase backend. The remaining primary blockers are finishing Supabase Auth trust-layer setup, validating the queued Sora run through completion and media proxy refresh in the live UI, and adding credits for Kling and Higgsfield.
active_workstreams: version groups, handoff packages, and delivery workflow refinement
current_priorities: Finish the Supabase Auth trust layer so emails and redirects are fully BrandBuild-native.
Refresh the live queued Sora dashboard run through completion and confirm /api/generate/[generationId]/content from the operator UI.
Resolve provider account readiness: fund Kling and add Higgsfield credits.
Authenticate and link the Supabase CLI for direct agent-managed functions and migrations on this machine.
Continue campaign-level sequencing and delivery workflow refinement after the live reliability work is finished.
blockers: Supabase Auth dashboard still needs branded email hook enablement, SMTP sender setup, and redirect cleanup.
The signed-in dashboard now queues Sora successfully, but the completed-output refresh and content-proxy path still need one live operator validation pass.
Kling live validation is blocked by account balance.
Higgsfield live validation is blocked by insufficient credits.
Supabase CLI is installed locally but not authenticated or linked to the BrandBuild project, so schema and function management cannot yet be driven from this machine.
risks: The repository can fall back to demo data too aggressively when live queries partially fail, which can hide production issues.
Direct live verification for some HTTPS paths from this shell can be noisy because PowerShell/curl intermittently hit local schannel credential errors.
Multiple memory folders can drift if they are not mirrored deliberately.
Multiple local clones of the BrandBuild repo can drift if future changes are split between D:\\Playground\\brandbuild-online-repo and D:\\Projects\\brandbuild.
assumptions: BrandBuild and AI Video Studio are the same product family.
D:\Playground\brandbuild-online-repo is the canonical BrandBuild repo and deployment source.
The current production deployment should track the local clean BrandBuild workspace, not the mixed legacy root workspace.
known_issues: Branded auth email infrastructure exists in code but is not fully live until the Supabase dashboard settings are completed.
Provider-output mirroring into Supabase Storage still requires SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY even though direct operator uploads no longer do.
There is still no dedicated sequencing timeline for arranging selected outputs across a campaign.
The root package naming still says ai-video-studio while the product brand is BrandBuild.
Next.js build warns that it is inferring the workspace root because both D:\Playground and the BrandBuild repo contain lockfiles.
recent_changes: Created D:\Playground\brandbuild-online-repo\supabase\manual\20260326_brandbuild_full_bootstrap.sql as a single paste-ready bootstrap that includes the missing legacy profiles foundation, BrandBuild schema, storage bucket policies, auth-user trigger wiring, and demo seed data for manual Supabase setup.

User clarified on 2026-03-26 that the correct BrandBuild Supabase project is https://ikdewffoqtliwkoywfrx.supabase.co and that the previously checked hdwneidxkakrzrhuxqcd project belongs to PolitiViral.
The earlier direct REST verification and missing-schema conclusion against hdwneidxkakrzrhuxqcd are now superseded for BrandBuild because they targeted the wrong project.

Cleaned apps/dashboard/.env.local so BrandBuild local development now points at ikdewffoqtliwkoywfrx with normalized provider and Supabase keys instead of the old PolitiViral project and newline-corrupted secrets.

Verified the correct BrandBuild Supabase backend directly: https://ikdewffoqtliwkoywfrx.supabase.co/rest/v1/campaigns?select=id&limit=1 returned the seeded campaign row 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111.

Updated the brandbuild-online Vercel production environment so NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_DEFAULT_KEY, and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY now point at the correct BrandBuild Supabase project.

Identified and resolved the Vercel deployment blocker caused by the repo head commit using BrandBuild Local <brandbuild@local.invalid>, then switched the repo git identity back to the approved deployment-owner identity.
Committed and pushed Align BrandBuild Supabase integration as 14daff9 so the head commit author now matches a valid Vercel team identity.
Deployed production successfully to the current Vercel production target and re-aliased https://brandbuild.online.
Verified the live homepage and login route both return 200 after the successful production deployment.
Confirmed direct campaign writes on the correct BrandBuild backend by inserting and deleting the temporary campaign slug smoke-1f2a856a through the Supabase REST API.
Confirmed the private assets bucket is real on the correct backend and accepts uploads by creating and deleting a temporary PNG in storage path smoke-tests/ae54c8e3b92546b7b4c9a90deb9b873e.png.

Re-ran the live provider smoke harness against the corrected environment: Sora queued job video_69c57e95635481918f524550c7a927690a2346e2b6e9823e successfully, Kling now fails on credits, and Higgsfield now fails on credits rather than invalid credentials.
Confirmed the Git remote is the canonical BrandBuild origin on the main branch for D:\Playground\brandbuild-online-repo.
Confirmed the local Vercel project link in apps/dashboard/.vercel/project.json points at brandbuild-online (projectId prj_tDiWPGRPN8Y3NAJ7kJEuljkp8rGr).

Confirmed Vercel CLI access to the deployment owner and the brandbuild-online project, then added the missing safe production env vars NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_NAME, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPPORT_EMAIL, STORAGE_BUCKET_ASSETS, and STORAGE_BUCKET_EXPORTS.
Confirmed the current Vercel production env inventory still does not list SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.
Confirmed the Supabase CLI is installed locally but not authenticated; npx supabase projects list fails until a SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN is provided or supabase login is completed.
Confirmed this repo currently has no supabase/config.toml, which means the workspace is not yet linked to a local or remote Supabase project through the CLI.

Confirmed the account-settings migration chain depended on legacy objects not present in the repo migration sequence: public.profiles, public.organizations, public.creator_profiles, public.campaign_profiles, public.app_role, and public.handle_updated_at().

Updated the unified generation pipeline so attached hosted, uploaded, and sample references now enrich provider prompt text for Sora and Kling while Higgsfield continues to receive direct reference-image URLs where supported.
Confirmed the Supabase CLI is installed locally but not authenticated; npx supabase projects list fails until a SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN is provided or supabase login is completed.
Deployed production after hardening the campaign surface so missing-schema Supabase environments show a clean setup state instead of surfacing raw public.campaigns cache errors.
Deployed production and re-aliased brandbuild.online after adding the Sora content proxy and authenticated storage refactor.
Added /api/generate/[generationId]/content so completed Sora outputs stream through BrandBuild with server-side auth instead of exposing a dead-end provider status object.
Updated the Sora adapter and smoke harness so completed video jobs resolve to the real OpenAI /content endpoint.
Refactored shot uploads and storage-backed asset URL signing to use authenticated Supabase storage access instead of hard depending on SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.
Added supabase/migrations/20260325164000_assets_bucket_policies.sql to create the private assets bucket and authenticated storage policies.
Confirmed with a live smoke test that the completed Sora job video_69c442cd810881939bdbe6afd2d428f80824e179028ff0fc is retrievable from the OpenAI content endpoint.
Added /dashboard/settings as a control-center route for system readiness and integration status.
Added the studio system audit model and settings UI.
Recovered production by deploying the latest BrandBuild workspace to Vercel and confirming brandbuild.online points at the new deployment.
Hardened the studio persistence client so dashboard pages return null instead of throwing when server-side auth client initialization fails.
Deployed a fresh production build and verified the live domain, login page, and signed-out dashboard redirect in a browser.
Pulled the current production environment into apps/dashboard/.env.local so local runs stop throwing NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL is not set.
Removed session-aware root-page calls so the marketing homepage is static again and the Dynamic server usage build warning no longer appears.

Deployed production and re-aliased brandbuild.online.
Verified the live site directly: / returns 200, /login returns 200, and signed-out /dashboard redirects to /login.

Expanded the reviews read model so each candidate carries campaign, shot, provider, generation, and average-score context without changing the underlying schema.
Re-ran typecheck and production build successfully after the compare-workspace batch.

Verified the live compare batch with direct checks: / returns 200, /login returns 200, and signed-out /dashboard and /dashboard/reviews redirect to /login.

Re-ran typecheck and production build successfully after the assets workspace batch.
Committed the assets workspace as 428ce4b and pushed main.
Deployed production and re-aliased brandbuild.online.
Verified the live root returns 200 after the assets workspace deployment.
Hardened Supabase middleware so session refresh failures return an anonymous response instead of throwing through the request pipeline.
Hardened auth email-action handling so magic-link and confirmation callback failures redirect safely back to login instead of hitting the global error page.

Deployed production and re-aliased brandbuild.online.
Verified the live root returns 200 after the auth-boundary incident fix.
Updated the public-site header and footer so access CTAs point directly to /login instead of relying on a /dashboard redirect.
Marked decorative marketing overlays and preview surfaces as pointer-events-none so they cannot intercept clicks on public CTAs.
Re-ran typecheck and production build successfully after the public login-path hardening batch.
Deployed production and re-aliased brandbuild.online.
Added a no-storage fallback on shot detail: operators can now attach hosted HTTPS asset URLs or import curated BrandBuild sample references without waiting on private-upload readiness.
Expanded the shot asset route so the existing /api/shots/[shotId]/assets endpoint now supports upload, hosted URL linking, and built-in sample import modes.
Added a curated BrandBuild reference-sample library with cinematic images plus a public motion-reference clip for quicker dashboard validation while storage rollout is still pending.
Updated the shot asset uploader UI so private upload, hosted-link, and sample-import paths all converge in the same shot asset workflow.
Deployed the shot reference fallback batch, re-aliased brandbuild.online, and verified the live root returned 200.
Pushed the hosted-reference and sample-import batch to origin/main in commit e7393d3 so git, deployment, and project memory are aligned again.

Added apps/dashboard/scripts/live-dashboard-smoke.mjs as a reusable live Playwright harness that signs into production, creates a campaign, attaches a hosted reference, and queues a Sora run through the real dashboard UI.

Identified a production shot-page hydration mismatch caused by locale-dependent timestamp formatting inside the client-side prompt builder generation history and replaced it with deterministic UTC formatting.
Updated apps/dashboard/.gitignore so local Playwright smoke artifacts stay out of git.
Re-ran npm run typecheck and npm run build successfully after the shot-workspace hydration fix and live smoke harness batch.
Deployed production to https://brandbuild-online-qjirkgm7c-byoroofers-projects.vercel.app and re-aliased https://brandbuild.online.
